title: macrocarpaea neillii
intro: Macrocarpaea neillii, also known as the Neill's macrocarpaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the Andes mountains in Peru and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Macrocarpaea neillii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
